context_text: <A> like you don't you know i would feel so offended but it helped me when i got older because they would always say lighten up { you } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> know that was like they what they always said to me now like you've got to lighten up okay we're just teasing you { you } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> can't you know get offended by every joke we make about you { and it helped } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> cause now i don't take when people tease me you know it's part of my sense of humor / <B> mhm
